## Best Options Trades Available

**1. Best CSP:**
TSLA $350 strike, 2026-05-29 expiry, 35 DTE, $9.10/$9.20 bid/ask, 0.28 delta, 27.3% annualized return

**2. Best CC:**
AMZN $270 strike, 2026-06-18 expiry, 55 DTE, $9.85/$10.00 bid/ask, 0.40 delta, 25.6% annualized return (existing position)

**3. Best LEAPS or PMCC:**
None qualify - all LEAPS have IVP >50% (too expensive) with poor timing signals

**4. Best Bull Call Spread:**
None available

**IVP Environment:** High volatility environment across the board - IVPs ranging from 55-90% making it a premium selling market, not buying conditions for LEAPS.
